posts.name: Aliya Nigamova
posts.text:
Dear all,
We are happy to announce a Combine tool tutorial on Wednesday September 27th.
Based on the feedback from the last tutorial this time we would like to focus on unfolding procedures in general as well as the implementation in Combine.
Please find the developing agenda at https://indico.cern.ch/event/1311191/, where you can already register for the event.
All the best,
Kyle and Aliya for the organisers
posts.cooked_html:
Dear all,

We are happy to announce a Combine tool tutorial on Wednesday September 27th.
Based on the feedback from the last tutorial this time we would like to focus on unfolding procedures in general as well as the implementation in Combine.
Please find the developing agenda at https://indico.cern.ch/event/1311191/, where you can already register for the event.

All the best,
Kyle and Aliya for the organisers
